name: Stuffed Mushrooms (Veg Times)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound tomatoes, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Wipe mushrooms clean. Remove stems and save for another use.
3. Lightly oil a baking sheet with 2 tablespoons olive oil and lay the mushrooms on it, stalk side up.
4. Pour about 1/2 teaspoon olive oil over each mushroom and bake for 20 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and set aside to cool.
6. Combine tomatoes, garlic, and scallions on a chopping board and chop until reduced to a puree. Place in a bowl and stir in the chives, salt, and pepper.
7. Stir in the remaining olive oil and lemon juice.
8. Fill each mushroom cap with the mixture and serve.
